name: SlashLink
author: Taako
description: Creates Red-managed application-command gateways for loaded cogs that only provide prefix commands.
install_msg: SlashLink loaded. Use `[p]slash list`, `[p]slash enablecog <CogName>`, and `[p]slash sync` to manage generated commands through Red's built-in slash manager.
short: Expose prefix-only cogs through Red's built-in slash manager.
end_user_data_statement: This cog does not persistently store user data. Generated proxy commands exist only in memory while the relevant cogs are loaded.
